_note: Updated daily at noon by the QA agent. Plain language — no jargon.

release_gate.label: No release in flight
release_gate.description: Tools are in active development. No public release is being prepared right now, so the release gate is not formally open. When a release is in flight, this will show a clear go or no-go.

test_suite.notes: All runnable tests passing. One test file can't be run due to a missing module path — it exists but the test runner can't find the code it's testing.

coverage_gaps.area: Room editor — placing and moving things on the canvas
coverage_gaps.gap: No automated tests for the actual canvas interaction. If drag-and-drop placement breaks, nothing will catch it automatically.
No test that a saved room opens back to exactly the same state it was saved in. This is the most important thing to get right for game production.
No test that an AI suggestion, once accepted, actually updates the room correctly. We're trusting this works without checking.
Everything is tested on Chrome. The canvas drawing code can behave differently in Safari and Firefox. We haven't checked.
No screenshot comparison tests. A visual change to a button or panel won't be caught automatically.

priorities.title: Fix the one test file that can't run — the room environment tests
priorities.note: One test file exists but fails to load because the code it's testing isn't being found. The tests may be perfectly good — they just need a path fix to run.
priorities.proposed_solution: Fix module or path configuration so room environment tests load the code under test and run in the standard suite.

priorities.title: Save/load round-trip test once room file versioning and migration are in place
priorities.note: Pairs with engineering's room save contract. Highest-value production path once the on-disk schema is stable.
priorities.proposed_solution: Add an automated test that saves a room, reloads it, and asserts entity and geometry state match exactly.

priorities.title: Copilot apply-path automation — generate, accept, verify the room
priorities.note: Part of the orchestration Copilot readiness program. Guard the accept path before any public Copilot exposure.
priorities.proposed_solution: Automate generate, accept, and verify; align fixtures with level design prompt changes and engineering model benchmarks.

priorities.title: Pre-launch browser coverage — Safari, Firefox, and basic automated smoke tests
priorities.note: Merged cross-browser checks with a minimal automated smoke pack before release.
priorities.proposed_solution: Focused canvas and interaction smoke in Safari and Firefox, plus a small automated load-and-smoke suite before launch.

risks_p1.title: Saving and loading rooms has no automated safety net
risks_p1.note: A bug in room saving could corrupt work silently. This is the highest-value test gap to close.

risks_p1.title: AI Copilot accept flow is untested
risks_p1.note: We can't confidently release the AI room assistant without a test that confirms the accept/apply path works end to end.

actions.name: Release Gate
actions.description: Go/no-go assessment with P0/P1 list, cross-browser status, and export determinism confirmation.

actions.name: Regression Plan
actions.description: Test plan mapping a set of changes to risk areas — with Playwright and unit test coverage specified.
actions.trigger: Given a set of changes to assess

actions.name: Bug Triage
actions.description: P0–P3 classifications with reproduction steps and assigned owner per issue.
actions.trigger: Given a batch of reported issues

actions.name: Copilot Fixture Run
actions.description: Schema validity rate, entity distribution, and content quality delta vs. previous pinned Copilot version.
actions.trigger: After any Copilot model version or prompt architecture change
